title: dombeya brevistyla
intro: Dombeya brevistyla, also known as the 'Tongatapu wild coffee', is a species of flowering plant in the hibiscus family (Malvaceae). It is native to the island of Tonga and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Dombeya brevistyla include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
